title: Fabric Scissors Professional 10 inch(25.4cm) Heavy Duty Scissors for Leather Sewing Shears for Tailoring Industrial Strength High Carbon Steel Tailor Shears Sharp for Home Office Artists Dressmakers
features: ULTRA SHARP FABRIC SHEARS: Made of high carbon steel which is more robust than stainless steel, the craft scissors have great edge retention and ability to make clean cut through layers of fabric.
COMFORTABLE USE: These fabric scissors are rounded and ergonomic to fit easily into your hand without rubbing or pinching, the rubberized handles allow for a comfortable grip and precise cutting.
PROFESSIONAL DESIGN: Bent handle and Tailor scissors blade head with chamfering process helps for accurate cuts.Scissors come lightly oiled for clean cutting and be sure to wipe them down when using.

FOR ALL PURPOSE:This sewing scissor can be Great for cutting multi-layers of fabric, burlap, Leather,canvas, denim,etc. Perfect for art crafts, sewing, quilting, dressmaking, knitting, and embroidery.

BONUS MEASURING TAPE & THREAD SNIP: Portable measuring tape, made from soft plastic material,fit for measuring curved/flat surfaces, dual-sided to show inches and centimeters, measuring range is 60 inches / 150cm.
